case_title: VINH GIANG TRAN VS. SIMON ZE LIANG WU et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2009 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TRAN, VINH GIANG AS TO DEFENDANT WU, SIMON ZE LIANG WU, STANLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-18-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
PROOF OF SERVICE ON SIMON ZE LIANG NOT ENTERED: NOT A PARTY TO THE CASE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAN, VINH GIANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WU, SIMON ZE LIANG WU, STANLEY PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT WAS THE CAUSE OF HIS INJURIES AND THE DAMAGE TO HIS CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-08-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WU, STANLEY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY TRAN, VINH GIANG WU, SIMON ZE LIANG
